x-enumeration-literals.name: Pending
x-enumeration-literals.description: Position is created but not yet active (e.g., awaiting settlement).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Open
x-enumeration-literals.description: Active position that can be updated or valued.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Partially Closed
x-enumeration-literals.description: Portion of the position has been reduced, but some remains.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Closed
x-enumeration-literals.description: Position is fully settled and no longer active.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Suspended
x-enumeration-literals.description: Temporarily inactive due to restrictions or issues.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cancelled
x-enumeration-literals.description: Position creation or update has been voided.
